description: Model detects non-drone objects as drones
examples: humans; windows; tree branches; poles; building tops; rooftop structures
practical_impact: Creates false alarms and reduces user trust

description: Model fails to detect visible drones
examples: far-range drones; drones near trees; drones near buildings; low-visibility drones
practical_impact: System may miss real drone activity
future_fix: Collect more local drone footage and fine-tune

description: Model detects drone for a short time and then loses it
examples: detection flickering; detection lost when background changes
future_fix: Add object tracking or temporal smoothing

description: Model detects one drone but misses another
examples: one drone detected while another is ignored
future_fix: Add multi-drone training samples and evaluate by scene type

description: Public-trained model struggles with local visual conditions
examples: phone camera footage; local buildings; humans; lighting; trees; windows
practical_impact: Public benchmark performance does not fully transfer locally
future_fix: Perform local annotated evaluation and region-specific fine-tuning
